name: Enneacraft Release
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>糾罪巧</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>エニアクラフト</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>－<ruby lang="jp"><rb>始導</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>リリース</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>
desc: Place 1 "Enneacraft" Pendulum Monster from your Deck in your Pendulum Zone. If this card is in your GY, except the turn it was sent there: You can banish it; add 1 face-up "Enneacraft" monster from your Extra Deck to your hand. You can only activate 1 "Enneacraft Release" per turn.
eff: Place 1 "Enneacraft" Pendulum Monster from your Deck in your Pendulum Zone. If this card is in your GY, except the turn it was sent there: You can banish it; add 1 face-up "Enneacraft" monster from your Extra Deck to your hand. You can only activate 1 "Enneacraft Release" per turn.

action: Places from Deck to Pendulum Zone
Adds from Extra Deck to hand
banished: Banishes itself from Graveyard for cost
